title: Purple White cpvp Pack 16x
description: A purple CPVP pack 16x with enchanced textures in a white and light purple style
body:
**This resourcepack is made for crystal pvp and and has the standard utils for cpvp like**
- small shield
- small pop
- no explosions sounds
- better particles
- crossbow indicator
  
**For upgraded better textures in a white and purple theme this pack contains**
- armor enchant glint
- golden apple
- mace
- netherite axe
- bottle o enchanting
- ender pearl
- better fire model
- low white purple fire
- respawn anchor
- end crystal
- realistic sun
- Hotbar
- animated totem
